---
id: list-closeout-batches
title: "List closeout batches"
description: "Returns closeout batch records for the given business date (defaults to today)."

hide_title: true

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List closeout batches"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/closeout/batches"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns closeout batch records for the given business date (defaults to today).

  as={"h2"}
